overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a torch-lit rural path at night. The character travels from open fields with stone walls through decorative gate structures into a dense forest, with atmospheric lighting from torches contrasting against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with stone walls approaching gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between stone walls toward a torch-lit wooden gate

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
low stone wall running along the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail with patches of grass
wooden gate frame with red decorative banners and burning torches
tall grass fields extending into the distance on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rural dirt path flanked by stone walls and tall grass fields. A wooden gate structure with burning torches looms ahead in the distance, providing warm orange light against the cool night atmosphere.

events.description: passes through the first wooden gate structure with red decorative banners

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the first gate, moving through open fields with scattered fence posts

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
second decorative gate with torches visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the first gate, the stone walls give way to open fields. The path continues toward a second decorative gate structure visible in the distance, with wooden fence posts lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning path between second and third gates

events.description: passes through the second gate and approaches the tree line
entering denser tree cover reduces ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking through the second gate and approaching the forest entrance

entered.detail: tall pine trees beginning to line both sides of the path
third wooden gate marking the deeper forest entrance
thick bushes and vegetation encroaching on the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the second gate as the environment transitions from open fields to forest. Tall trees begin to flank the path, and a third gate structure appears ahead marking the deeper forest entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

events.description: entering the dense forest area with tall pine trees

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the dark forest along the torch-lit trail

entered.detail: tall mature pine trees forming a dense canopy overhead
large fallen tree trunk visible among the undergrowth

segments.scene_description: Now deep within the forest, tall pine trees tower over the path, blocking much of the night sky. The torch-lit gate structure stands ahead as the character navigates the darker, more enclosed woodland trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from open, torch-lit fields into the depths of a dense forest. It begins with the character walking between stone walls and tall grass, moving toward a distant wooden gate illuminated by burning torches. As the character passes through this first gate, the stone walls vanish into open fields lined with wooden fence posts that lead toward a second decorative gateway. The scene then shifts as the character crosses this second threshold, where the open landscape gives way to the first towering trees of the woodland. Finally, the path narrows into a dark, enclosed forest of pine trees that block out the night sky, moving toward a final torch-lit gate deeper within the woods.
